entry_exit.entry: Buy at close on day mention spike combined with elevated volatility is detected
entry_exit.exit: Exit after 5 trading days or if realized volatility drops below 80% of 30-day average before 5 days

steps: Calculate daily count of ticker mentions on r/wallstreetbets
Compute 5-day moving average of mention counts
Identify days where mention count > 2x 5-day moving average
Calculate 10-day realized volatility (std dev of log returns)
Signal triggers when both mention spike and volatility elevation occur simultaneously
